task: Peter lent his bicycle to Henry. He returned it the following weekend without any scratches.
The librarian recommended the novel to the student. She thought it would help with her essay.
The musician tuned the guitar carefully. It had not been played in many months.
Carla congratulated Sofia on the promotion. She had worked toward it for several years.
The author signed the book for the fan. It was a first edition copy from her library.
Daniel asked Alex for advice about the project. He had handled similar challenges before.
The photographer captured the sunset over the lake. It looked stunning in the final print.
Hannah supported Charlotte during the difficult interview. She felt grateful for the encouragement afterward.
The runner crossed the finish line first. He had trained intensely for several months.
implementations: The pronoun "He" refers to "the finish line".
